prompt: 新增 unipus-qa-automation skill，需要 minor 版本升级、feat commit

assertions.name: correct_version_bump_minor
assertions.description: 决定 minor 版本升级（x.X.x），不选 patch 或 no-bump

assertions.name: selective_staging
assertions.description: 使用选择性 git add（不使用 git add -A 或 git add .）

assertions.name: correct_commit_type_feat
assertions.description: 使用 feat 作为 commit type

assertions.name: coauthored_by_present
assertions.description: commit 消息包含 Co-Authored-By: Claude

assertions.name: push_to_master
assertions.description: 包含 git push origin master
